title: Raw HTML (rawhtml)
text: Raw HTML (rawhtml) DSP widget property that determines whether HTML code in the field is interpreted and formatted ( True ), or is displayed as plain text ( False ). " rawhtml = True | False " Value Description True HTML is interpreted and formatted. False HTML is shown as text. Table 1. Example Field Contents Raw HTML = True Raw HTML = False Italic text and bold text Italic text and bold text Italic text and bold text Usage Dynamic? Yes Default value: Depends on widget Applies To FlatButton RawHTML StaticText Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
